tools.name: get_multi_context
tools.description: Get context for multiple identifiers in a single request. Useful for batch operations.

identifiers.description: List of identifiers to get context for

type.description: Optional type filter applied to every identifier

depth.description: How many relationship levels to traverse

includeTests.description: Whether to include classified test evidence

exact.description: Exact matching; omit for exact-first fallback

maxRelationships.description: Maximum entries returned per relationship list

maxCallSites.description: Maximum source locations per aggregated relationship

maxTestFiles.description: Maximum test files returned; zero is count-only

maxTestMethods.description: Maximum test methods per file; zero is count-only

sourceFile.description: Repository-relative or absolute source file filter

relation.description: Comma-separated relation kinds to filter uses/usedBy (CALLS, MOCK_CALLS, REFERENCES, IMPLEMENTS, INHERITS, EXTENDS, IMPORTS, USES); compact view only

view.description: Response shape; compact is the default

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Get comprehensive context for a code identifier. Returns relationships, dependencies, tests, and metrics.

identifier.description: Canonical returned identifier, symbol name, or file path

type.description: Filter by type (Class, Method, Interface, Property, etc.)

depth.description: How many relationship levels to traverse (0-10)

includeContent.description: Whether to include file content snippets

exact.description: Exact matching; omit for exact-first with substring fallback

includeRelated.description: Whether to include loosely related symbols

maxRelationships.description: Maximum entries returned per relationship list

maxCallSites.description: Maximum source locations returned per aggregated relationship; zero is count-only

maxTestFiles.description: Maximum test files returned; zero is count-only

maxTestMethods.description: Maximum test methods returned per file; zero is count-only

expandAmbiguous.description: Expand bounded ambiguous matches instead of returning summaries

containingType.description: Filter members by their containing type

namespace.description: Filter by exact namespace or module

sourceFile.description: Filter by repository-relative or absolute source file

relation.description: Comma-separated relation kinds to filter uses/usedBy (CALLS, MOCK_CALLS, REFERENCES, IMPLEMENTS, INHERITS, EXTENDS, IMPORTS, USES); compact view only

view.description: Response shape; compact is the default

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Get comprehensive system health and debugging information
